Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 55 

OUD_ANY_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Overarching OUD Disorder (Any of the Three Sub-Indicators) First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare 
Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Overarching opioid use 
disorder (OUD) condition indicator (Any of the Three Sub-Indicators). The
